title: GraphWaypoints
description: Adds a waypoint system for easy navigation.
body:
**GraphWaypoints** adds a powerful waypoint system to enhance your navigation in Minecraft. Mark important locations, track them across all dimensions, and share coordinates with ease. It’s a simple and effective tool for any explorer.

---

## 🛠️ Features

- **Waypoint Management**: Create, customize (name, color), and organize waypoints for all dimensions through an intuitive interface.
- **Compass Navigation**: A compass bar at the top of your screen displays all active waypoints for easy tracking over long distances.
- **Hotkeys & Sharing**: Use configurable hotkeys to open the waypoint manager (default: `B`) or toggle their visibility if they get in the way (default: `K`). You can also instantly share coordinates with a button or a server command (`/c`).

---

## 📸 Screenshots

### Waypoints in Action

![Simple Waypoint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/me5Sp3Qd/images/789a3b0e4f31f6d257e17bd36f017402f55d54f9.png)

### Waypoint Manager

![Waypoint Manager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/me5Sp3Qd/images/ab8aa8c829f3642c52fba39f42060b9834ac3bcf.png)

---

## 📋 Installation

1.  Install **Fabric** and **Fabric API**.
2.  Place the `graph_waypoints.jar` file in your `mods` folder.
3.  Launch Minecraft and configure hotkeys in the Controls menu (default: `B` for manager, `K` to toggle visibility).
4.  For servers: Install on the server to enable the `/c` command.

---

## 🔧 Compatibility

- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.x 26.1.x
- **Mod Loader**: Fabric
- **Dependencies**: Fabric API
